title: pyrus tiliifolia
intro: Pyrus tiliifolia, also known as the wild pear or silver pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Pyrus tiliifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Pyrus tiliifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
